title: iberis reverchonii
intro: Iberis reverchonii, also known as the Creeping Candytuft, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering health benefits such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Iberis reverchonii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
